title: indexOf()
subtitle: Find an element's position
goal: Learn to find an element's position in an array using indexOf().
explanation: indexOf() searches for a value in an array.
If the value is found, its index is returned.
If the value is not found, -1 is returned.
The method helps determine an element's position.
indexOf() is often used together with conditions.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: You are looking for a book on a shelf and want to know not only whether it is there, but also where it is located.

remember: If the element is absent, it returns -1.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners often think -1 means the last element. In fact, it means the element was not found.
